visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on the face of an East Asian man. He has short, dark hair and is wearing large, black over-ear headphones. His expression is one of intense concentration and seriousness as he looks down and slightly to his right, as if listening intently to something. The background is dark and out of focus, suggesting a nighttime setting. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in a white, stylized font. The camera remains static, holding the tight focus on his face. The audio begins with a sharp, percussive sound, like a quick, impactful musical sting, creating a sense of suspense and anticipation.

The scene cuts to a wide shot of a black sports car at night. The car is parked on the side of a road, with its driver's side door open. The car's distinctive circular taillights are brightly illuminated, casting a red glow. The surrounding area is dark, with some out-of-focus lights in the distant background and some foliage to the right. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. This is immediately followed by the loud, mechanical sound of a car door opening, which then transitions into the soft, rustling sound of someone getting out of
